rules: Always use `import type` for type-only imports.
All controllers must have `@UseGuards(TenantGuard)` unless explicitly marked global.
Never perform raw SQL updates without appending `tenant_id = :tenantId`.
Never fetch data directly in client components on mount; use React Query or Server components.
Services must not interact with HTTP Req/Res objects.
Inject `PricingContext` to check limits before creating entities.
